title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo v0.1.0 is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework written in TypeScript (Node.js 22 LTS), built with tsc and Vite, tested with Vitest, and persisted via SQLite (better-sqlite3). Core architecture: input routing → command dispatch or agent execution → LLM provider adapters (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek) → tool calls (exec, glob, grep, read) → SQLite persistence, with a built-in Pepe semantic memory system (embedding, retrieval, ranking).
